_publications._publicationTitle: SVA retrotransposon insertion-associated deletion represents a novel mutational mechanism underlying large genomic copy number changes with non-recurrent breakpoints.

_contextSnippet: Sequence analysis of the corresponding PCR products provided the precise breakpoint locations of the 15 deletions that exhibited simple breakpoints with readily interpretable transitions from centromeric to telomeric breakpoint-flanking sequences
resourceName: BigDye Terminator v3.1 Cycle Sequencing Kit
details: Provided precise breakpoint locations for 15 deletions with simple breakpoints and readily interpretable transitions from centromeric to telomeric breakpoint-flanking sequences
